from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from claire.app import create_app
app = create_app()
client = TestClient(app)
for route in ["/", "/health", "/docs", "/dashboard/payload", "/dashboard/payload/status"]:
    try:
        r = client.get(route)
        print("ROUTE", route, r.status_code)
        if route == "/dashboard/payload" and r.status_code == 200:
            data = r.json()
            print("PAYLOAD_KEYS", sorted(list(data.keys()))[:200])
            print("HAS_GOVERNED_RECONCILIATION", "governed_payload_reconciliation" in data)
    except Exception as exc:
        print("ROUTE_ERROR", route, type(exc).__name__, str(exc))
